owner_id.description: ID of the owner - if omitted, will default to your id

alternative_name.description: An additional name for the protein

gene.description: The gene from which the protein is derived

species.description: The species from which the protein originates

lg_mutations.description: List of mutations in the protein structure

chemical_modifications.description: Details any chemical modifications the protein has undergone

tag.description: A label or tag attached to the protein

purification_method.description: The method used to purify the protein from other biological components

mw.description: The molecular weight of the protein

storage_buffer.description: The buffer solution in which the protein is stored

storage_temperature.description: The temperature in which the protein is stored

sequence.description: The amino acid sequence of the protein

description.description: A detailed description of the protein
